reviews.review_description:
I like it. The movement is nice. It's simple and fun but it could use some lighting. If you get in an area with low lighting, you can't see anything. I got stuck in nearly in the dark with a broken engine. Went to fix it and couldn't find the gear that I dropped to fix. Since it has a battery system, maybe add a switch for a lightbar when it gets dark in some areas. 

So far that was my only issue. Other than that, great job devs!
The this is a fun game the movement is great! I love the game
